meta.title: Wellness | Essentia Social Wellness Club
meta.description: Discover Essentia's comprehensive wellness protocols in Tenerife — contrast therapy, breathwork, red light therapy, manual therapies, and functional well-being.

hero.body: Every protocol is designed to work with your body's natural intelligence: activating recovery, building resilience, and calibrating your system from the inside out.

contrast-therapy.title: Contrast Therapy
contrast-therapy.description: Heat and cold to activate recovery and reduce inflammation.

breathing-sessions.title: Breathing Sessions
breathing-sessions.description: Guided breathwork to shift from stress to active recovery.

red-light-therapy.title: Red Light Therapy
red-light-therapy.description: Red and infrared light to stimulate cellular repair and regeneration.

manual-therapies.title: Manual Therapies
manual-therapies.description: Precise manual work to release tension and restore mobility.

functional-well-being.title: Functional Well-being
functional-well-being.description: Movement and strength training designed around longevity.

approach.body: Essentia is not a spa and not a gym. It is a precision wellness environment where every protocol is chosen for its measurable effect on your biology and your experience of being alive.

I.title: Full spectrum
I.description: No single modality is enough. Thermal, light, breath, touch, and movement work as one integrated system.

II.title: Adaptive
II.description: Each session follows your current state — recovery, activation, or calibration. The protocol adapts to you.

III.title: Cumulative
III.description: Restoration compounds over time. Regular practice builds a baseline of resilience that changes how your body responds to stress.

cta.heading: Ready to restore?
cta.body: Access to all wellness protocols is included with every Essentia membership. Your tier determines the depth of your programme and the priority of your bookings.

treatments.manualTherapiesSubtitle: Each treatment is designed with a specific purpose. Choose the one that fits what your body needs today.

serviceDetail.ctaBody: Reserve your {service} session at Essentia Wellness Club — Baobab Suites, Costa Adeje, Tenerife.

contrast-therapy.title: Contrast Therapy.
contrast-therapy.heroAlt: Contrast therapy — sauna and cold plunge at Essentia
contrast-therapy.intro: Alternating heat and cold is one of the most studied recovery modalities in sports science. At Essentia, we have designed a structured protocol that maximises the cardiovascular, hormonal, and anti-inflammatory response of each transition.
contrast-therapy.benefitsSubtitle: The science behind thermal contrast is well established. These are the mechanisms that matter most.

0.title: Reduces inflammation
0.description: Cold immersion constricts blood vessels and clears metabolic waste. Repeated transitions accelerate the clearance of inflammatory markers after training or injury.

1.title: Stimulates heat shock proteins
1.description: Sustained sauna exposure triggers HSP production — molecular chaperones that repair damaged proteins and protect cells against future stress.

2.title: Improves cardiovascular resilience
2.description: The rapid vasoconstriction and vasodilation cycle trains the autonomic nervous system and improves heart rate variability over time.

3.title: Enhances sleep quality
3.description: The drop in core temperature after cold exposure signals the brain to enter deeper sleep phases, shortening sleep onset and increasing slow-wave duration.

contrast-therapy.sessionSubtitle: Sessions are guided. You will never be left to figure it out alone.

I.title: Duration
I.description: 60 minutes. Three alternating rounds: 12–15 minutes in the sauna followed by 2–3 minutes in the cold plunge. Short rest between rounds.

II.title: Format
II.description: Solo or shared. Our therapist sets the protocol based on your goal: recovery, activation, or adaptation. First session includes a brief assessment.

III.title: Frequency
III.description: Two to three sessions per week is optimal for most members. We track your response and adjust the protocol as your baseline improves.

contrast-therapy.ctaBody: Contrast Therapy is included in all Essentia memberships. Book your first session or join the community to get started.

breathing-sessions.title: Breathing Sessions.
breathing-sessions.intro: Controlled respiration is the fastest lever we have over the autonomic nervous system. Our guided breathwork sessions are built on the evidence: Wim Hof, coherence breathing, box breathing, and CO2 tolerance work — applied to your current state.
breathing-sessions.benefitsSubtitle: Breath is the only autonomic function you can consciously control. That makes it uniquely powerful.

0.title: Reduces cortisol
0.description: Slow, rhythmic breathing activates the vagus nerve and shifts the nervous system from sympathetic dominance into parasympathetic recovery — measurably lowering cortisol within minutes.

1.title: Improves heart rate variability
1.description: Coherence breathing at five breaths per minute synchronises heart rate, blood pressure, and baroreflex sensitivity, improving HRV — a key marker of recovery capacity.

2.title: Enhances CO2 tolerance
2.description: Most people over-breathe. Training your tolerance to CO2 improves oxygen delivery to tissues (the Bohr effect) and reduces anxiety responses triggered by hypocapnia.

3.title: Sharpens focus and resilience
3.description: Cyclic hyperventilation followed by breath retention activates the sympathetic system in a controlled way, building mental resilience and cognitive clarity under stress.

breathing-sessions.sessionSubtitle: Every session is guided by a trained instructor. No prior experience required.

I.title: Duration
I.description: 45 minutes. Opening check-in, a 30-minute guided protocol, and a 10-minute integration rest. You may feel light-headed during the session — that is normal and expected.

II.title: Format
II.description: Group sessions run twice a week. Private 1:1 sessions are available for members who prefer a personalised protocol or have specific performance or therapeutic goals.

III.title: Frequency
III.description: One to two sessions per week produces consistent results. Many members combine breathwork with contrast therapy on the same day for a more complete recovery protocol.

breathing-sessions.ctaBody: Breathing Sessions are included in all Essentia memberships. Book your first session or join the community to get started.

red-light-therapy.title: Red Light Therapy.
red-light-therapy.heroAlt: Red light therapy panel at Essentia
red-light-therapy.intro: Photobiomodulation uses specific wavelengths of red and near-infrared light to penetrate skin and tissue, stimulating the mitochondria at a cellular level. At Essentia we use medical-grade full-body panels calibrated to the wavelengths with the strongest clinical evidence.
red-light-therapy.benefitsSubtitle: Light therapy works at the cellular level. The effects accumulate with consistent use.

0.title: Stimulates mitochondrial function
0.description: Near-infrared light (810–850 nm) is absorbed by cytochrome c oxidase in the mitochondrial membrane, increasing ATP production and cellular energy availability.

1.title: Accelerates tissue repair
1.description: Red light (630–670 nm) promotes fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis, speeding recovery from muscle damage, tendon injuries, and skin conditions.

2.title: Reduces systemic inflammation
2.description: Photobiomodulation consistently reduces markers of oxidative stress and pro-inflammatory cytokines in controlled studies across a wide range of conditions.

3.title: Supports thyroid and hormonal health
3.description: Emerging research shows near-infrared light applied to the thyroid gland can improve function in subclinical hypothyroidism and reduce dependence on medication.

red-light-therapy.sessionSubtitle: Simple, passive, and highly effective. No preparation required.

I.title: Duration
I.description: 10–20 minutes per session. You stand or sit in front of the full-body panel at the prescribed distance. Eyes should be protected with the provided goggles.

II.title: Format
II.description: Solo sessions in a private booth. Skin should be clean and free of sunscreen or thick moisturisers to allow maximum light penetration. Clothing is removed for target areas.

III.title: Frequency
III.description: Three to five sessions per week delivers the best cumulative effect. Many members integrate a 15-minute red light session before or after contrast therapy.

red-light-therapy.ctaBody: Red Light Therapy is included in all Essentia memberships. Book your first session or join the community to get started.

manual-therapies.title: Manual Therapies.
manual-therapies.intro: Our manual therapists work with the whole body: fascia, muscle, joint, and nervous system. Every session is an assessment as much as a treatment — finding what is restricted, what is compensating, and what needs to be released before it becomes a problem.
manual-therapies.benefitsSubtitle: Skilled hands accomplish what no machine can replicate. These are the outcomes we target.

0.title: Releases fascial restrictions
0.description: Fascial adhesions from training, injury, or prolonged sitting limit range of motion and force the body into compensatory patterns. Manual release restores optimal tissue glide.

1.title: Reduces chronic tension and pain
1.description: Targeted pressure on trigger points deactivates pain referral patterns and restores normal muscle tone in ways that foam rolling or self-massage cannot replicate.

2.title: Improves joint mobility
2.description: Articular mobilisation techniques restore the accessory movements within joints that are lost after injury or immobilisation, reducing pain and improving function.

3.title: Enhances recovery between sessions
3.description: Regular manual work reduces the accumulation of mechanical stress, keeping tissue quality high and reducing the risk of overuse injuries during high-training periods.

manual-therapies.sessionSubtitle: Every session begins with a brief assessment. Nothing is done without a reason.

I.title: Duration
I.description: 60 or 90 minutes. We recommend 90-minute sessions for the first appointment to allow time for a full postural and movement assessment before treatment begins.

II.title: Format
II.description: 1:1 with a certified therapist. Modalities include deep tissue massage, myofascial release, joint mobilisation, and dry needling depending on presentation and preference.

III.title: Frequency
III.description: Acute issues typically resolve in three to five sessions. Maintenance for active members is one session every two to four weeks to sustain tissue quality and prevent recurrence.

manual-therapies.ctaHeading: Release what is holding you back.
manual-therapies.ctaBody: Manual Therapies are available to all Essentia members. Book your first session or join the community to get started.

functional-well-being.title: Functional Well-being.
functional-well-being.intro: Muscle mass and movement quality are two of the strongest predictors of longevity. Our coaches build programmes around the specific physical capacities that matter most for a long, capable life — strength, mobility, cardiovascular efficiency, and balance.
functional-well-being.benefitsSubtitle: Training for longevity is different from training for aesthetics. These are the outcomes that matter.

0.title: Preserves and builds muscle mass
0.description: Sarcopenia — the age-related loss of muscle — begins in the 30s and accelerates with each decade. Resistance training is the most effective intervention we have to slow and reverse it.

1.title: Improves metabolic health
1.description: Skeletal muscle is the largest glucose sink in the body. More muscle mass means better insulin sensitivity, lower HbA1c, and a reduced risk of metabolic disease.

2.title: Maintains joint health and mobility
2.description: Strength training through full ranges of motion loads cartilage, stimulates synovial fluid production, and maintains the joint integrity needed to stay active across decades.

3.title: Reduces all-cause mortality
3.description: VO2 max and grip strength are among the most predictive markers of longevity. Our programmes systematically improve both through targeted aerobic and resistance work.

functional-well-being.sessionSubtitle: Training here is structured, progressive, and built around your specific goals and baseline.

I.title: Duration
I.description: 50 minutes. A brief warm-up, a focused strength or conditioning block, and a mobility cool-down. Sessions are dense — no filler, no wasted time.

II.title: Format
II.description: Your first session is a movement and capacity assessment. From that baseline, your coach builds a progressive 12-week plan. Sessions are 1:1 or in small groups of three.

III.title: Frequency
III.description: Two to three strength sessions per week is the minimum effective dose for meaningful adaptation. We coordinate scheduling with your other Essentia protocols for optimal recovery.

functional-well-being.ctaBody: Functional Well-being is included in all Essentia memberships. Book your first session or join the community to get started.

breathing-sessions.metaDescription: Guided breathwork sessions at Essentia to balance body and mind, reduce stress, and enhance performance.

manual-therapies.metaDescription: Expert manual therapy sessions at Essentia to relieve tension, improve mobility, and restore your body's natural balance.

red-light-therapy.metaDescription: Photobiomodulation and red light therapy at Essentia Tenerife for cellular regeneration, recovery, and skin health.
